about_bio: We help you build SaaS faster
about_description: Learn more about our mission and how we can help you
about_introduction: 👋 Hi there! This is TanStarter, the complete TanStack Start boilerplate for building profitable SaaS, packed with AI, auth, database, storage, blog, email, newsletter, payments, i8n, SEO, and more, fully deployed on Cloudflare Workers. If you have any questions, please welcome to contact us for free.
admin_users_ban_reason_placeholder: Enter reason for banning this user…
ai_page_caption_description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to describe an image or answer a question about it.
ai_page_caption_presets_0: Generate a caption for this image.
ai_page_caption_presets_1: Describe what you see in this image in detail.
ai_page_caption_presets_2: List 5 keywords that describe this image, comma-separated.
ai_page_caption_presets_3: What objects are in this image?
ai_page_common_read_file_error: Could not read the selected file.
ai_page_description: Built with TanStack AI, Cloudflare Workers AI, and fal.ai.
ai_page_image_description_cf: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to generate images directly from a text prompt.
ai_page_image_description_fal: Powered by fal.ai with switchable models to generate vivid images from text prompts.
ai_page_image_edit_description: Powered by fal.ai to turn an uploaded portrait into a stylized cartoon, caricature, or anime version.
ai_page_image_edit_empty: Your stylized portrait will appear here.
ai_page_image_edit_presets_0_prompt: Transform this person into a cute bobblehead-style cartoon caricature: oversized round head, tiny shoulders, glossy clean line art, vibrant flat colors, rosy cheeks, friendly smile, plain solid pastel background, sticker-style, keep the original facial features recognizable.
ai_page_image_edit_presets_1_prompt: Transform this person into a Pixar-style 3D animated character with big expressive eyes, smooth shaded skin, soft cinematic lighting, friendly smile, clean studio background, keep the original identity recognizable.
ai_page_image_edit_presets_2_prompt: Transform this person into a high-quality anime character portrait, cel-shaded with crisp linework, expressive sparkling eyes, soft pastel background, Japanese animation style, keep the original facial features recognizable.
ai_page_image_empty: Your generated image will appear here.
ai_page_image_placeholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
ai_page_image_presets_0_prompt: A cute red panda wearing a tiny astronaut helmet floating among nebulas, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed
ai_page_image_presets_1_prompt: Cyberpunk Tokyo street at night, rain-soaked neon reflections, holographic billboards, cinematic, ultra detailed
ai_page_image_presets_2_prompt: A peaceful Japanese mountain village at sunrise, watercolor painting style, soft light, delicate brush strokes
ai_page_image_presets_3_prompt: Minimalist product photo of sleek matte-black wireless earbuds on white marble, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field
ai_page_image_presets_4_prompt: 16-bit pixel art of a tiny dragon guarding a glowing crystal cave, retro game aesthetic, vibrant colors
ai_page_seo_description: Demo of TanStack AI integrated with Cloudflare Workers AI and fal.ai.
ai_page_summarization_description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to condense long text into a concise summary.
ai_page_summarization_placeholder: Paste a long article or paragraph here...
ai_page_summarization_sample: Cloudflare Workers AI lets developers run machine learning models on the Cloudflare global network. It provides a serverless GPU-powered inference platform that brings popular open-source models close to end users without managing any infrastructure. Combined with Cloudflare AI Gateway, teams gain caching, analytics, rate limiting, and unified billing across many AI providers, making it easy to ship reliable AI features in production.
ai_page_tagline_description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to generate punchy SaaS taglines from a description.
ai_page_tagline_empty: Five generated taglines will appear here.
ai_page_tagline_placeholder: Describe what your SaaS does in one or two sentences...
ai_page_tagline_sample: A SaaS boilerplate built with TanStack Start, Cloudflare Workers, Better Auth, and Drizzle ORM. Helps indie developers ship a production-ready app over a weekend.
ai_page_translation_description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to translate text across many languages.
ai_page_translation_placeholder: Type or paste text to translate...
ai_page_translation_same_language: Source and target languages must be different.
ai_page_translation_sample: Cloudflare Workers AI lets developers run machine learning models on the edge.
ai_page_tts_description: Powered by Cloudflare Workers AI to synthesize natural speech from text input.
ai_page_tts_empty: The generated audio will appear here.
ai_page_tts_placeholder: Type or paste the text you want to read aloud...
ai_page_tts_sample: Hello from Cloudflare Workers AI. This demo turns text into natural-sounding speech in just one API call.

footer_tagline: Ship Faster with TanStack, Cost Less with Cloudflare
home_call_to_action_description: Join thousands of teams building with TanStarter today
home_faqs_items_item_1_answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
home_faqs_items_item_1_question: Can I change my plan later?
home_faqs_items_item_2_answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfer for annual plans.
home_faqs_items_item_2_question: What payment methods do you accept?
home_faqs_items_item_3_answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all paid plans. No credit card required.
home_faqs_items_item_4_answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact support for a full refund.
home_faqs_items_item_5_answer: Email support is included for all plans. Pro and above get priority support.
home_features_description: Built-in features so you can focus on your product
home_features_items_item_1_description: Store and query your data with a powerful database layer. Supports relations, migrations, and type-safe access.
home_features_items_item_2_description: Secure auth with email, OAuth, and magic links. Session management and role-based access built in.
home_features_items_item_3_description: User profiles, avatars, and account management. Connect multiple providers per user.
home_features_items_item_4_description: Track usage and conversions. Dashboards and reports out of the box.
home_features2_description: Everything you need to build and ship faster
home_hero_description: The complete TanStack Start boilerplate for building profitable SaaS, packed with AI, auth, database, storage, blog, email, newsletter, payments, dashboard, i8n, SEO, and more, fully deployed on Cloudflare Workers
home_hero_title: Ship Faster with TanStack, Cost Less with Cloudflare
home_integration_description: Connect to the tools you already use
home_integration_items_item_1_descriptio: Connect to OpenAI, Anthropic, and more.
home_integration_items_item_2_descriptio: Deploy and run in the cloud.
home_integration2_description: Connect seamlessly with popular platforms and services to enhance your workflow
home_logo_cloud_title: Your favorite companies are our partners
home_pricing_block_description: Choose the plan that fits your needs
home_testimonials_items_item_1_quote: The best TanStarter kit we evaluated. Auth and billing just work.
home_testimonials_items_item_2_quote: TanStarter really saved us months of development. We shipped our MVP in just 2 weeks.
home_testimonials_items_item_3_quote: Clean code, great DX. We extended it for our use case easily.
home_testimonials_items_item_4_quote: Finally a template that includes auth, billing, and dashboard out of the box. No more stitching boilerplate.
home_testimonials_items_item_5_quote: The stack choices and structure are exactly what we needed.
home_testimonials_items_item_6_quote: Best-in-class starter for production SaaS. Our team recommends it to every founder building with modern React.
